Provider.title: Provider
Provider.description: Represents a service provider in the network.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Provider entity.

slug.description: A URL-friendly slug for the provider.

bannerImageUrl.description: URL of the provider's banner image.

description.description: A rich-text description of the provider.

solutions.description: An array of solutions offered by the provider.

impressions.description: Total number of times the provider has been viewed.

clicks.description: Total number of times the provider link has been clicked.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the provider was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the provider was last updated.

published.description: Indicates if the provider is visible to the public.

ReviewerProfile.title: ReviewerProfile
ReviewerProfile.description: Represents a reviewer's profile and associated information for display on the USA Testimonial Network.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ReviewerProfile entity.

state.description: The U.S. state the reviewer is from.

profilePictureUrl.description: URL of the reviewer's profile picture.

reviewId.description: Reference to the Review entity. (Relationship: Review 1:1 ReviewerProfile)

id.description: Unique identifier for the Review entity.

reviewText.description: The text content of the review.

AnimationSequence.title: AnimationSequence
AnimationSequence.description: Represents a sequence of reviewer profiles for animation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AnimationSequence entity.

sequenceOrder.description: The order of the animation sequence.

BlogPost.title: BlogPost
BlogPost.description: Represents a blog post in the admin panel.

id.description: Unique identifier for the BlogPost entity.

title.description: The title of the blog post.

slug.description: A URL-friendly slug for the blog post.

category.description: The category of the blog post.

featuredImageUrl.description: URL of the post's featured image.

content.description: The rich-text content of the blog post.

quote.description: An optional pull-quote from the content.

authorImageUrl.description: URL for the author's profile image.

views.description: Total number of times the blog post has been viewed.

comments.description: Total number of comments on the post.

shares.description: Total number of times the post has been shared.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the post was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the post was last updated.

published.description: Indicates if the post is visible to the public.

NewsletterSubscriber.title: NewsletterSubscriber
NewsletterSubscriber.description: Represents a user who has subscribed to the newsletter.

email.description: The email address of the subscriber.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the subscription was created.

AdminUser.title: AdminUser
AdminUser.description: Represents an administrator or privileged user in the admin panel.

name.description: The name of the admin user.

passkey.description: The unique passkey for the user to log in.

AdminRole.title: AdminRole
AdminRole.description: Defines a role with a set of permissions for the admin panel.

name.description: The name of the role (e.g., Editor, Moderator).

permissions.description: A map of page IDs to their specific permissions (view, create, edit, delete).

AdminSession.title: AdminSession
AdminSession.description: Stores a temporary session for an anonymously authenticated admin user, linking them to their role.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the session was created.

definition.description: Stores information about each service provider.

params.name: providerId
params.description: The unique identifier for the provider.

definition.description: Stores reviewer profile information, including reviewerName, state, profilePictureUrl, and reviewId.  'profileId' is the unique identifier for each reviewer profile.

params.name: profileId
params.description: The unique identifier for the reviewer profile.

definition.description: Stores review data, including reviewText. 'reviewId' is the unique identifier for each review.

params.name: reviewId
params.description: The unique identifier for the review.

definition.description: Stores the sequence of reviewer profiles for animation, including profileIds and sequenceOrder. 'sequenceId' is the unique identifier for each animation sequence.

params.name: sequenceId
params.description: The unique identifier for the animation sequence.

definition.description: Stores all blog post data, managed via the admin panel.

params.name: postId
params.description: The unique identifier for the blog post.

definition.description: Stores email addresses of users who subscribed to the newsletter.

params.name: subscriberId
params.description: The unique identifier for the newsletter subscriber.

definition.description: Stores user accounts for the admin panel.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the admin user.

definition.description: Stores roles and permissions for the admin panel.

params.name: roleId
params.description: The unique identifier for the admin role.

definition.description: Stores temporary sessions for admin users to link their anonymous auth UID to their role for security rules.
